description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, clean-lined exterior. The facade features large, white-framed windows arranged in symmetrical rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front entryway is accentuated by a small porch with stone steps, potted plants, and outdoor seating, creating a welcoming atmosphere. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal white siding, complemented by a stone base around the entry. A spacious wooden deck extends from one side of the house, partially enclosed by a railing and accessible via steps. The overall design is simple yet elegant, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functional outdoor living space.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, white siding, large symmetrical windows, and a spacious wooden deck with a welcoming front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, porch, potted plants, outdoor seating, and the wooden deck to the left.
description_view_1: Side view with two large windows and plain white siding, minimal architectural features visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying four large windows in symmetrical rows and the continuation of the flat roof and white siding.
description_view_3: Side view with a single large window, the wooden deck, and visible outdoor furniture, as well as the deck steps.
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with a small porch, stone steps, potted plants, and outdoor seating, no overhang or columns.
